news_items.excerpt: Jan van Eck suggested that analysts have been overcomplicating recent Bitcoin price action, arguing that the four-year cycle has been the main driver holding prices down.
news_items.title: Bitcoin is forming a bottom as the 4-year cycle ends: VanEck CEO

news_items.excerpt: Core Scientific missed revenue expectations in the fourth quarter as Bitcoin miners were squeezed by lower prices and higher costs.
news_items.title: Core Scientific shares move lower as Q4 earnings miss estimates

news_items.excerpt: U.S. BTC ETFs added $458 million, suggesting institutional buyers are absorbing the weekend shock that briefly sent BTC to $63,000.
news_items.title: Bitcoin climbs as BTC ETFs post one of the quarter’s biggest inflow days amid Iran volatility

news_items.excerpt: Compressed volatility, strengthening ETF flows, and a diminished Coinbase discount “are not characteristics of a market accelerating into a fresh leg lower,” said 10x Research.
news_items.title: Bitcoin slide slowing, but bear market still in play: Analysts

news_items.excerpt: The ClickFix technique gained popularity among crypto hackers last year, but security researchers have been tracking it since 2024, with targets spanning several industries.

news_items.excerpt: Private execution layer aims to curb MEV and front-running as the token extends 40% weekly rally despite modest onchain earnings.

news_items.title: Nasdaq files for prediction market-style options on Nasdaq-100

news_items.excerpt: The proposed prohibition was slipped into a Senate housing bill, reviving language used in previous standalone bills to block a Fed-issued US digital dollar.
news_items.title: Senate housing bill amendment proposes to block US CBDC until 2030

news_items.excerpt: A federal judge said Uniswap isn’t responsible for scam tokens traded on the crypto platform, a decision that its founder Hayden Adams said was a “sensible outcome.”
news_items.title: Uniswap beats class action alleging it assisted crypto ‘rug pulls’

news_items.excerpt: Elliptic’s initial tracing found many of the funds were sent to foreign crypto exchanges, potentially indicating capital flight from Iran amid rising uncertainty in the region.
news_items.title: Iranian crypto outflows spike 700% after US-Israeli airstrikes

news_items.excerpt: The Senate Banking Committee's bipartisan "ROAD to Housing Act" includes a provision banning the Fed from issuing a CBDC before 2031.

news_items.title: PayPay, 40% owner of Binance Japan, seeks up to $1.1 billion in Nasdaq IPO

news_items.title: Core Scientific turns lower after Q4 results disappoint
